runtime_snapshot.description: Last reviewed Tanaghom n8n inventory. This is deployment evidence, not a browser-to-n8n connection.

roles.name: Campaign Strategist
roles.responsibility: Turns an approved business brief into positioning, channels, messages, cadence, and measurable campaign direction.

roles.name: Content Producer
roles.responsibility: Creates channel-specific draft content from the approved strategy and hands every public-facing item to a human reviewer.

roles.name: Publisher & Performance Monitor
roles.responsibility: Creates approved Postiz drafts, observes published performance, and returns attributable results without bypassing human control.

roles.name: Sales & CRM Agent
roles.responsibility: Synchronizes leads, prepares governed CRM actions, supports high-volume conversations, and proves reply quality before autonomy expands.

workers.name: Campaign Strategy Generator
workers.responsibility: Claims strategy jobs, asks Gemma for a versioned strategy contract, validates it, and persists accepted evidence.

workers.name: Campaign Content Generator
workers.responsibility: Claims content jobs, generates validated drafts, records provenance, and stops at the human approval gate.

workers.name: Postiz Draft Publisher
workers.responsibility: Revalidates approval immediately before creating a Postiz draft; it has no automatic publish path.

workers.name: Postiz Performance Monitor
workers.responsibility: Reads authorized analytics through the private gateway and records normalized performance and attribution evidence.

workers.name: GHL Contact Sync
workers.responsibility: Creates or updates an explicitly queued GHL contact through the private credential gateway.

workers.name: Conversation Intelligence Worker
workers.responsibility: Claims accepted inbound conversations, asks Gemma for a grounded cited proposal, and persists proposal-only evidence for human supervision.

workers.name: Governed GHL Actions
workers.responsibility: Executes only database-authorized messages, qualification, booking, pipeline, and ownership actions with policy rechecks.

workers.name: Quality Shadow Evaluator
workers.responsibility: Compares proposal-only AI replies with de-identified human baselines and records evidence without taking an external action.
